summary: First iteration: tested all backend CRUD endpoints (insulin, food upsert, water, stats) via pytest (5/5 pass, 100%). Verified no Mongo _id in responses. Frontend mobile viewport smoke-tested on production URL: home renders 3 primary buttons + stats/export, navigation works for all 4 screens, insulin save creates record and shows in history, food 6-meal status toggles + save works, water quick-add (250ml) + save works and appears in history, stats screen renders summary cards and BarChart/LineChart without crashing.

issues: React Native Web console warnings: deprecated shadow* style props (use boxShadow); Invalid DOM property transform-origin; Unknown event handlers onResponder*/onStartShouldSetResponder from react-native-chart-kit. Non-blocking but noisy.

react_native_issues.issue: Expo reports mismatched versions: @react-native-community/datetimepicker@9.1.0 (expected 8.4.4), expo-print@55.0.13 (expected ~15.0.8), expo-sharing@55.0.18 (expected ~14.0.8), react-native-svg@15.15.4 (expected 15.12.1). Currently working but may cause issues on native builds.

action_items: Optional: align package versions via `npx expo install --fix` for native build stability.
Optional: replace shadow* styles with boxShadow to silence RN Web warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean (<260 lines), proper async/await, _id excluded via projection in all GETs, Pydantic validation on all inputs, env-based Mongo config.
Frontend uses testID consistently, KeyboardAvoidingView on form screens, RefreshControl + 30s auto-refresh for sync, mobile touch targets ≥44px.
seed_data_creation: Pytest creates & cleans up TEST records for date 2026-01-15; frontend smoke test created 1 insulin + 1 food + 1 water record for today (not cleaned).
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. If regressions arise, run `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_api.py -v` first. Frontend public URL: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in /app/frontend/.env. No auth.
